textPlain:
I was expecting flash LIDAR and MEMS mirror systems to dominate self-driving cars by now, but rotating machinery is still dominant in the US.The trend in China and Japan is a long-range forward-facing LIDAR coupled with three shorter-range units for side and rear coverage.[1] The long-range unit still costs around US$10,000.
This should come down with volume.[1] https://www.robosense.ai/en/news-show-1908[2] https://openelab.io/products/robosense-em4-thousand-beam-lon...
